evals.prompt: gemini review my Google Ads changes — I just added 50 broad match keywords to my Search campaign targeting 'best crm software'
evals.expected_output: A structured review with PASS/FAIL verdict covering keyword match type risks, budget implications, and negative keyword recommendations
expectations: Checks for broad match risks and recommends negatives
Produces a PASS or FAIL verdict with reasoning

evals.prompt: stress test with gemini — I'm changing my homepage title tag from 'Acme CRM | Customer Relationship Management' to 'Best CRM Software 2026 | Acme'
evals.expected_output: An adversarial analysis with risk level, attack vectors covering potential ranking disruption, keyword cannibalization, and CTR impact
expectations: Identifies risk of losing branded search rankings
Flags potential CTR change from title reformulation

evals.prompt: ask gemini — should I use Target ROAS or Maximize Conversions for a new lead gen campaign with no historical data?
evals.expected_output: An opinionated recommendation explaining Google Ads auction mechanics and why one strategy suits cold campaigns better
expectations: Provides a clear recommendation with reasoning
References Google Ads auction or Smart Bidding learning period
Explains trade-offs between the two strategies
